a.xlink:title: Encode SER records to ASN.1 BER/TLV format.
Broadcast data to all connected clients (push model).
Broadcast all SER records from the database to all clients.
Send current database records to client as ASN.1 BER/TLV.
Start the processing worker: register a reader and launch its thread.
Send the next queued message (if any).
Handle broadcast write completion — drains pending queue.
Perform broadcast write operation (called on strand).
Send a plain text response to this client (for FIL DIR etc.).
Start the session by accepting WebSocket handshake.
Initiate async read for next client message.
